column5: Facebook Reels RPM $0.02-$0.60/1K views. US audience CPM $20.48. Most creators see $0.04-$0.08. 1M views = $40-$600. Unified Content Monetization replaced old fragmented programs Aug 2025. Invite-only bonus up to $35K/mo.
column12: Verified across multiple sources. US geo = premium RPM.
column16: Cross-post to FB Reels for higher RPM than YouTube Shorts.

column5: FB Reels algorithm prioritizes same-day content with 50% more distribution. Rewatches and completions count more than total views. 15-30s optimal length (45% higher completion). Hook required in first 3 seconds. Original content rewarded watermarked suppressed.
column12: Meta official engineering blog. Algorithm details confirmed.
column16: Post same-day. 15-30s videos. Hook in 3s. No watermarks.

column5: TikTok Creator Rewards $0.40-$6.00 RPM. 10-25x old Creator Fund rates. Finance/Tech/Business = $1.00+ RPM. Standard = $0.40-$1.00. 1M views = $400-$6000. Requires 10K followers 100K monthly views 1min+ videos.
column12: Major upgrade from old fund. Niche matters significantly.
column16: Create 1min+ finance/tech content for max RPM.

column5: TikTok 70% completion rate now needed to go viral (up from 50% in 2024). Saves and shares weighted above likes. Comment quality > quantity. First 60 mins critical for algorithm push. 60-180s videos outperforming 15s clips.
column12: Algorithm change documented. Higher bar for viral.
column16: Focus retention. Longer videos. Early engagement critical.

column5: TikTok follower-first distribution new in 2026. Videos shown to followers first before wider push. Oracle deal causing algorithm retraining Q1 2026. Original content heavily favored reposted content suppressed. TikTok SEO: keywords in captions text and audio scanned.
column12: Structural change from Oracle deal. Monitor for fluctuations.
column16: Build follower base first. Use TikTok SEO keywords. Original only.

column5: YouTube Shorts RPM $0.01-$0.50. Most creators $0.03-$0.07. Finance niche 10x comedy/lifestyle ($0.05-$0.30 vs $0.01-$0.03). 1M views = $10-$500. 45% creator share (YouTube keeps 55%). Shorts = 22% of YouTube ad revenue but lowest creator payout. Best for growth not revenue.
column12: Lowest paying platform. Use for audience growth only.
column16: Use Shorts for growth. Drive traffic to long-form or other platforms.

column5: X/Twitter doubled creator revenue pool January 2026. 25% of Premium sub revenue to creator pool. Musk directive: pay more than YouTube for right creators. Timeline impressions now weighted. 2026 declared year of the creator.
column12: Major policy shift. Doubled pool confirmed. Watch sustainability.
column16: Prioritize X content. Timeline impressions matter most.

column5: X $1M prize for top Article during next payout period. US users only. Articles must be 1000+ words. Articles heavily weighted in new algorithm. X Money wallet (Visa-backed) coming 2026 for payouts.
column12: $1M single prize. US only. Long-form content play.
column16: Write 1000+ word Articles on X for prize eligibility.

column5: X creators reporting 2-3x previous payouts with flat impressions. First time X feels like real income stream per testimonials. Engagement-based model shifted from ad revenue late 2024. X Premium growth = creator earnings growth.
column12: Creator testimonials positive. Verify with personal testing.
column16: Test X monetization personally. 2-3x claims unverified but widespread.

column5: Threads creator bonus program KILLED April 2025. Meta gave no public explanation. Previous bonuses $500-$5K for view/post goals. No direct creator monetization currently active. Ads launched globally May 2025 but creators don't earn. Use Threads for brand building only.
column12: No direct monetization. Deprioritize for revenue.
column16: Threads = brand building only. Zero direct revenue potential.

column5: Kick 95/5 split vs Twitch 50/50 default. $5 sub = $4.75 Kick vs $2.50 Twitch. 1.9x more per subscriber. Twitch Partner Plus 70/30 requires 350 recurring subs for 3 months. 100% donations kept on both platforms.
column12: Clear arbitrage. Kick nearly 2x per sub. Major streamers switched.
column16: Stream on Kick or dual-stream. 95/5 split transformational.

column5: Kick $16/hour incentive for eligible streamers. Creator Incentive Program offers guaranteed wages. Entry requires channel verification 1500+ subs and activity benchmarks. xQc $100M contract. Adin Ross migrated. Kick backed by Stake gambling.
column12: Hourly incentive real but selective. xQc deal verified.
column16: Apply for Kick incentive program if streaming. Hourly wage bonus.

column5: Cross-post same video to TikTok FB Reels YT Shorts IG Reels = 4-10x total revenue vs single platform. 9:16 vertical works everywhere. Export raw (no watermarks). Customize captions per platform. Post same day for max FB Reels boost.
column12: Core arbitrage strategy. Multiply revenue with same content.
column16: Cross-post all short-form content. 4-10x revenue multiplier.

column5: TikTok SEO: keywords in captions on-screen text and spoken audio all scanned for search ranking. TikTok becoming search engine not just entertainment. 3-5 relevant hashtags optimal. Hashtag stuffing dead.
column12: TikTok as search engine confirmed. Optimize keywords everywhere.
column16: Use keywords in caption text and audio. 3-5 hashtags max.

column5: FB Reels rewatches and completions count more than total views. User True Interest Survey (UTIS) model surfaces niche high-quality content. Friend bubbles show which Reels friends liked spreading engagement through social circles.
column12: Meta official. Rewatch signal optimization opportunity.
column16: Create rewatchable content. Completion > view count.
